title: Verify daily decrement of 'Remaining Days' counter
description: Test that the 'Remaining Days' counter on the homepage widget and Trial Corner hub decrements by one each day.
preconditions: User has an active trial for more than one day

steps.description: 1. Note the remaining days on Day X.
2. Wait for 24 hours (or simulate time change).
3. Re-launch the app and navigate to the homepage/Trial Corner.

expected_result: The counter should show one day less than the previous day.
